data.name: Legacy of the Fallen
data.detailed_description:
Legacy of the Fallen is a CRPG fantasy game where the player hunts down Perseus, Poseidon and others in order to recover their most prized posession, the legendary Fragarach.  The game features many romancable characters throughout the game as well as turn-based combat, animations and a great story rich in various mythologies from around the world.

Story

The world around you is shattered, and betrayal runs in your blood. Your Aunt Medusa? Slain by the so-called hero Perseus, her soul imprisoned by your own grandmother, Athena—a goddess with secrets darker than the abyss. Your other aunts, Stheno and Euryale, were pawns in a centuries-long war, twisted and exploited by the seductive succubus Queen Igret in her vendetta against the Olympians. Even your parents are tainted—one of your parents, Ceraphina is a fallen Olympian, rejected by her kin.

Raised as a guardian, you were forged in the fires of family loyalty, trained from childhood to shield those you hold dear. Your mother vanished when you were young, leaving behind a single relic: The Fragarach, a brutal hammer of the ancient North, thrumming with untamed power. It’s all you have of her—and it’s yours by right.

But fate doesn’t care about rights. When your aunts leave you to chase a desperate quest to free Medusa’s soul, a shadowy intruder strikes. They rip Fragarach from your hands, leaving you more than half dead with nothing but rage and a burning vow. Now, you’ll carve a path through gods, monsters, and demons—across blood-soaked battlefields and the ruins of divine lies—to reclaim what’s yours. The cost? Everything. The reward? Vengeance, redemption for a legacy thousands of years in the making.

Gameplay

Romance:

Legacy of the Fallen features numerous romancable characters with few limitations. You are able to explore and build these relationships as you travel the globe.

Combat:

This game features an exciting turn-based combat system.  You are able to level up yourself, your skills and gain affinities as well as your party members.  You are also able to fully customize your character's class and abilities including multi-classing.

In addition to classes, the main character can select from three energy "affinities": Chaos, Heavenfire and Lust. These affinities add special moves and bonuses on top of your class.

Chaos:

Chaos Energy is typically associated with demons although several powerful gods and succubi have been known to be able to use this energy. It is associated with pain, suffering and loss.

Heavenfire:

Heavenfire is the energy of the gods. It is the power from hope and faith.

Lust:

Lust energy is associated with love, empathy and, well, lust. The succubus race is well known for having an affinity to lust energy although there are a few unique gods that have lust affinities.

Characters/Party Members

Chrys (the MC):

You are able to chose from either a male or female version of Chrys.  Chrys is the son/daughter of the Olypian Ceraphina and the Gorgon Euryale.  Don't ask how that works. Reproduction among gods is mysterious.

Ceraphina:

Your mother and who raised you.  She's the daughter of Athena but never knew her. She was came to the mortal plan and fell in love with the Gorgon Euryale who she helped to rescue her sister Stheno and defeat the Succubus Queen Igret bat Mahlat.

Pegasus:

Not much is known about Pegasus’ origins. She’s clearly a goddess, but you wonder who her parents are. She’s not great with people, growing up mostly alone, but you can tell there is more to her story.

Future planned characters:

  • Callirhoe (Greek Oceanid)

  • Lakapati (Filipino goddess of fertility)

  • Macha (Irish goddess of war)

  • Hina (Maori diety)

Content Flavors

NOTE: All flavors should be considered optional depending on player choices. This is not a comprehensive list as development is still early.

  • Male/Female sex

  • Lesbian sex

  • Seduction (combat)

data.short_description: Legacy of the Fallen is a fantasy CRPG where you woo goddesses and demons, fight in turn-based battles, and grow you and your party's power.
data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 簡體中文, 日文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Pentium or Core CPU
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 4GB VRAM
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 11
  • 處理器: Intel Core or AMD Zen or later
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 8GB VRAM
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 22.04
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3 or equivalent
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 4GB VRAM
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
linux_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 24.04 or later
  • 處理器: Intel Core or AMD Zen or later
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 8GB VRAM
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
